name: basic-greeting
description: Verify the skill responds to a simple greeting prompt

cases.name: hello-response
cases.input: Hello, can you help me understand this skill?
cases.expectedBehavior: The agent should explain the test scenario format and point to tests/scenarios.json

name: test-format-explanation
description: Verify the skill explains test case structure when asked

cases.name: explain-assertions
cases.input: What assertion types are available for skill tests?
cases.expectedBehavior: The agent should list all six assertion types with brief explanations

cases.name: create-test-file
cases.input: Create a sample test scenario for a code-review skill
cases.expectedBehavior: The agent should produce a valid JSON test scenario for a code-review skill
